content.en:
Time flies.

Ye Tian insisted on refining the Tianyan spear, and it took a long time to finally refine the Tianyan spear.

Rumble!!!!

The aura of the Tianyan spear diffused and opened, causing this void to collapse.

Ye Tian hurriedly refined the Tianyan Spear, and gradually calmed down the aura of the Tianyan Spear.

Then, he held the Tianyan spear in his hand, practiced his moves, and found that his strength had increased a lot.

"At least three times more combat power!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At his level, it is extremely difficult to increase his strength every little, let alone triple his combat power!

And the Supreme Realm Soldier is not only a matter of improving combat effectiveness, but also can penetrate the enemy's defenses.

For example, a high-level demon seed has a very high physical defense, if he can't penetrate the opponent's defense, it will be difficult to hurt the opponent, but the Tianyan spear can penetrate the opponent's defense, which has a completely different meaning.

"No wonder every high-level realm god and high-level demon seed is eager to obtain a supreme realm soldier!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Such a supreme realm soldier, if it was taken out and sold, it would definitely be able to sell for tens of millions of Eternal Realm Stones for a high price.

But no one would take a Supreme Soldier and sell it, that would be stupid.

"Close!"

As soon as Ye Tian's mind moved, this Supreme Realm Soldier was put away by Ye Tian and placed in the Eternal Dao Seed.

"It's a pity that the Supreme Realm Soldiers can't refine the Eternal Dao Seed!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

This thing is just a simple weapon, which is used to increase combat power, and it is not helpful for cultivation.

But if it is all-powerful, it will be too rebellious.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't pay much attention to this aspect.

......

Another long time has passed.

The Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material on Ye Tian's body was almost exhausted, but his Eternal Dao Seed still hadn't been raised to its current limit.

Obviously, with his current cultivation, it would be too difficult to quickly raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, and the resources consumed were far beyond what he could imagine now.

this day.

There was news from the Realm.

"Medium Force Notice!"

This news is to let the Terran Holy State assess the medium power, and once the assessment is successful, then the Terran Holy State will be able to claim to the outside world as a medium force in the future.

But in fact, the Terran Holy Kingdom now has a lot of realm gods, and they are all qualified to evaluate powerful forces.

However, you must first assess the medium power before you can apply to become a strong power.

So on this day, Ye Tian took some of the realm gods to the realm court headquarters to conduct the assessment of the middle forces.

Boundary Court Headquarters.

Ye Tian came here, and the Eternal Realm God Realm Primary-Peak Realm Realm God of the Realm Headquarters, the Baihe Realm God, received Ye Tian and took Ye Tian and them to the location where the middle forces were assessed.

"Ye Tian Realm God, it is very simple to assess the middle force, that is, the number of realm gods in the force needs to reach more than ten, and at least have more than three Eternal Realm God Realm Junior Realm Gods, and have a certain industry, territory, etc., so that it can be assessed as a medium force. "The White River Realm God is very polite to Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian is a middle-level cultivator in the Eternal Realm God Realm.

He also knew that the Terran Holy Kingdom would definitely be able to become a medium force, and this time it was just a formality.

Immediately, the Baihe Realm God asked Ye Tian and them to break through the Realm God Tower, which was a status to test the strength of the Realm God, and passing a certain level would be considered a pass.

"Xingchen, Lin Lei, you just go and break in!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Yes, Lord Ye Tian!"

These realm gods went to break through one after another, and soon completed the assessment and reached the standard, plus this time the number of realm gods of the Terran Holy Kingdom met the requirements, and the Realm Court immediately revised the information and included the Terran Holy Kingdom in the ranks of medium forces.

But.

Before leaving, Ye Tian asked, "Baihe Realm God, what requirements does the Terran Holy Kingdom need to meet if it wants to become a powerful force?"

The Baihe Realm God hurriedly said: "Ye Heaven Realm God, if the Terran Holy Kingdom wants to become a powerful force, it must master the territory of ten Eternal Realms, one Eternal Realm God Realm Intermediate Realm Realm God, more than ten Eternal Realm God Realm Primary-Order Realm Gods, and more than a hundred Realm Gods. "[]

Ye Tian calculated, the number of the Eternal Realm God Realm has not yet reached the standard, but the Eternal Realm God Realm Intermediate Rank is far from reaching the standard, and the number of the Eternal Realm God Realm is also up to the standard, and the territory territory has not reached the standard.

At present, if the Terran Holy Kingdom wants to expand its territory, the first way is to subdue other forces and incorporate the territories of other forces into its own territory.

At the beginning, the old mountains wanted to subdue the Terran Holy Kingdom, but also to prepare for their future impact on powerful forces.

It's a pity that the old mountain found the wrong object, which caused the old mountain to suffer a big loss.

Ye Tian was not interested in subduing other forces, which would make the forces of the human race become mixed.

Therefore, he would rather relocate several of the Eternal Realms of the Endless Realm Alliance to the realm of the Realm God Realm, so as to satisfy the problem of territory territory.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian asked: "'Baihe Realm God, let the Eternal Realm of the Eternal Realm relocate to the Realm God Realm, how many places are there now. "

He knew that every once in a while, some places would be released in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, and the eternal kingdom that met the requirements could be relocated to the realm of the Realm God realm, and sometimes even if the quota was given, there might not be an eternal kingdom that met the requirements.

"There are still eighteen places left!" said Shirakawa Realm Shinto.

"I want ten places!" Ye Tian said.

"Ten places!!!" The Baihe Realm God was surprised, "Ye Heaven Realm God, if you want ten places, you need a lot of battle points!"

"My record points should be enough. Ye Tian said.

He had earned a lot of battle points before, which he hadn't used up yet, and he hadn't redeemed anything later, so it should still be enough.

"I'll check it out!"

The White River Realm God went to investigate.

Soon, Bai (Li Qianzhao) River Realm God said: "Ye Heaven Realm God, your battle score is indeed enough, are you sure that you want the ten eternal realms to be relocated to the realm god realm?"

"Sure!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, the Baihe Realm God applied for Ye Tian.

It didn't take long for the application to be successful.

Ye Tian successfully obtained ten tokens, representing the ten eternal realms, and at that time, there will also be the realm gods of the realm court to assist the human race in relocating the ten eternal realms to the realm of the gods.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, please choose a location!"

Shirakawa realm Shinto.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian divided some of the ruins near the Terran Holy Kingdom into his territory, and these ruins were as big as ten eternal realms, which was why he wanted to exchange the ten eternal realms for relocation places.

Because if there are too many, they can't be stuffed, and they have to be separated.

So, it is enough to move ten eternal kingdoms.
